svg.title: Distributed Voting System Architecture
svg.desc: Data flows from Edge Nodes through Flask API to RabbitMQ then Worker then Supabase

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the edge nodes in this voting system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the edge nodes in this voting system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the edge nodes in this voting system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Flask API layer in this voting system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about RabbitMQ CloudAMQP in this voting system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Worker service in this voting system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Supabase database in this voting system')

svg.text: Replaces GCP: Cloud Run → Render · Pub/Sub → CloudAMQP · Firestore → Supabase
Fault tolerance: RabbitMQ buffers votes during worker downtime → auto-replays on recovery · Idempotency via doc_id primary key
